Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPPROC1 ;DALOI/JCH - Digital Veterans Platform ;11/15/17 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; ^PXRMINDX(9000010.18 4290 ; ^PXPXRM 4250 ; ^PXAPIOE 1541 Q ; GETPROCS(RECSET,MODE,PROCID,ICN,SUMM,QDATE1,QDATE2) ; Get Patient Meds ; RECSET: Return array ; MODE: "S"=SEARCH "R"= READ ; PROCID: The external procedureId when doing a READ ; ICN: Patient ID if MODE="S" (no PROCID) ; SUMM: Summary flag ; SDATE: Start of date range to seach for procedures (performed date) ; EDATE: End of date range to search for procedures (performed date) ; N DUZ,SMRY S (DUZ,DUZ(2))=1 S:$G(ICN)="" ICN=$P($G(PROCID),":",5) S DFN=$$GETDFN^MPIF001(ICN) ; ; Default to last 10 years I '$G(QDATE1("SDT")) S QDATE1("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT(DT,-10950) I '$G(QDATE1("EDT")) S QDATE1("EDT")=$$NOW^XLFDT() I '$G(QDATE2("SDT")) S QDATE2("SDT")=QDATE1("SDT") I '$G(QDATE2("EDT")) S QDATE2("EDT")=QDATE1("EDT") ; Overlapping date range, define ranges as one union of two date range I QDATE1("SDT")<QDATE2("EDT")&(QDATE1("SDT")>QDATE2("SDT")) I ($E(QDATE1("PFX"))="g")&($E(QDATE2("PFX"))="l") D . S QDATE2("SDT")=QDATE1("SDT"),QDATE1("EDT")=QDATE2("EDT") ; K ^TMP($J,"DVPCPT") ; ; Get all procedures for patient from PXRMINDX, set into ^TMP($J,"DVPCPT" I $G(DFN)'="" D PPL(DFN,.QDATE1,.QDATE2) ; ; Search PXRMINDX procedures returned in ^TMP N ITMP,FIELDS,TYPE,ILST,J,DVPCPT,FOUND,TTFOUND,RECSLOC S (TTFOUND,ILST)=0 S DVPCPT=$NA(^TMP($J,"DVPCPT",DFN)) S FOUND=0,ITMP="" F S ITMP=$O(@DVPCPT@(ITMP)) Q:'ITMP D . N DVPPROC . I MODE="R" D . . S:ITMP=$P(PROCID,":",6) (TTFOUND,FOUND)=1 . I (MODE="S")!(FOUND=1) D . . S FOUND=0 . . S FIELDS=@DVPCPT@(ITMP) . . D FHIRPROC(.RECSLOC,ICN,ITMP,FIELDS,+$G(SUMM)),SETPID(RECSET,ITMP,ICN) . . M @RECSET=RECSLOC I MODE="R",TTFOUND=0 D . N RECSLOC D OOERR^DVPERR(.RECSET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","No procedure found for procedureId: "_$P(PROCID,":",6),"GETPROCS^DVPPROC1") ; K ^TMP($J,"DVPCPT") Q ; FHIRPROC(RECSLOC,ICN,DAINDX,FIELDS,SMRY) ; Build procedure resource ; N RSLTSUM,RSLTDET,VISIT,PROLE,DFN,PCLASS,VSITDET,VSITERR,PERFPROV,PXUID,PXUIDEXT,XX,IDENT,CPTNAME,CPTCOCO N ORDER,RSLTERR ; S DFN=$$GETDFN^MPIF001(ICN) ; D VCPT^PXPXRM(DAINDX,.RSLTSUM) S VISIT=$G(RSLTSUM("VISIT")) S RSLTDET="RSLTDET",RSLTERR="RSLTERR" I VISIT D CPTARR^PXAPIOE(+VISIT,RSLTDET,RSLTERR) ; ; Identifier ; S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"identifier")=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("procedure",ICN,DAINDX) S PXUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,DAINDX,"9000010.18") S PXUIDEXT=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("procedure",ICN,DAINDX) S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_PXUIDEXT N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,XX) M RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"identifier")=IDENT ; ; Order (Request) basedOn I 'SMRY D . I +$P($G(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0)),U,17) D FHIRORD^DVPXUTL(.ORDER,$P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0),U,17)) . M RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"basedOn",1)=ORDER ; ; Status S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"status","coding","code")="unknown" S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"status","coding","system")="http://hl7.org/fhir/event-status" S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"status","coding","display")="Unknown" ; ; Context (Encounter/Visit) I 'SMRY D . N X S X="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("encounter",ICN,VISIT) . N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,X) M RECSLOC("results","encounter")=IDENT ; ; cpt code I +$G(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0)) D GETS^DIQ(81,+$P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0),U)_",","2;3;6","IE","CPTNAME") S CPTNAME=$G(CPTNAME(81,+$P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0),U)_",",2,"E")) I CPTNAME'="" D . N CPTSYS,CPTSRC . S CPTSRC=$G(CPTNAME(81,+$P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0),U)_",",6,"I")) . S CPTSYS=$S(CPTSRC="C":"http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt",1:"http://www.cms.hhs.gov/MedHCPSGenInfo/") . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"code","coding","system")=CPTSYS . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"code","coding","code")=+$P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0),U) . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"code","coding","display")=CPTNAME . ; Procedure (CPT) Category . I 'SMRY D . . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"category","coding","system")=CPTSYS . . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"category","coding","code")=$G(CPTNAME(81,+$P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0),U)_",",3,"I")) . . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"category","coding","display")=$G(CPTNAME(81,+$P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,0),U)_",",3,"E")) ; ; date performed S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performed")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(FIELDS,U,2)) ; ; encounter provider (performer) I '$G(SMRY) S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performer",1,"id")=$P($G(RSLTDET(DAINDX,12)),U,4) ; ; Get string of info from PERSON CLASS (#8932.1) - x12 (CMC Provider Taxonomy) code and name. ; Performer's PERSON CLASS role on the date the procedure was performed $P(RSLTDET(DAINDX,12),U) returned in PCLASS() I '$G(SMRY) D . N PROCPRC . D LIST^DIC(200.05,","_RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performer",1,"id")_",",".01E;2I;3I","P",,,,,,,"PCLASS") . S PCLASS=$$ROLRNG($P($G(RSLTDET(DAINDX,12)),U),.PCLASS) . S PROLE=$$IEN2DATA^XUA4A72(+PCLASS) . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performer",1,"role","coding","system")="http://www.wpc-edi.com/reference/codelists/healthcare/provider-characteristics-codes" . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performer",1,"role","coding","code")=$P(PROLE,U,7) . S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performer",1,"role","coding","text")=$P(PROLE,U) . D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.PROCPRC,$G(RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performer",1,"id"))) . M RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"performer",1,"actor")=PROCPRC ; ; Location - V CPT file (#9000010.18), VISIT field (#.03), -> VISIT file (#9000010), HOSPITAL LOCATION field (#.22) I '$G(SMRY) D . D GETS^DIQ(9000010,+RSLTSUM("VISIT")_",","*","IE","VSITDET","PXERR") . D FHIRLOC^DVPXUTL(.LOCRES,VSITDET(9000010,+RSLTSUM("VISIT")_",",.22,"I")) . M RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"location")=LOCRES ; ; Note - V CPT file (#9000010.18), Comments field (#81101) I '$G(SMRY) S RECSLOC("results",DAINDX,"note",1,"text")=$G(RSLTDET(DAINDX,811)) ; Free Text Narrative ;N PTXTPTR,PTXT S PTXTPTR=$G(RSLTSUM("PROVIDER NARRATIVE")) ;Q:'PTXTPTR D GETS^DIQ(9999999.27,+PTXTPTR_",",.01,"E","PTXT","PXERR") ;Q:$G(PTXT(9999999.27,+PTXTPTR_",",.01,"E"))="" ;M @RECSLOC@("results",DAINDX,"note","text")=PTXT(9999999.27,+PTXTPTR_",",.01,"E") Q ; PPL(DFN,QDATE1,QDATE2) ; Get all procedures for patient DFN between SDATE and EDATE ;; Clinical Reminders Index ^PXRMINDX(9000010.18,"PPI",DFN,TYPE,ITEM,DATE,DA) N TYPE,ITEM,DATE,DA S TYPE="" F S TYPE=$O(^PXRMINDX(9000010.18,"PPI",+$G(DFN),TYPE)) Q:TYPE="" D . S ITEM=0 F S ITEM=$O(^PXRMINDX(9000010.18,"PPI",+$G(DFN),TYPE,ITEM)) Q:ITEM<1 D . . S DATE=0 F S DATE=$O(^PXRMINDX(9000010.18,"PPI",+$G(DFN),TYPE,ITEM,DATE)) Q:DATE<1 D . . . I (DATE<QDATE1("SDT")!(DATE>QDATE1("EDT")))&(DATE<QDATE2("SDT")!(DATE>QDATE2("EDT"))) Q . . . S DA=0 F S DA=$O(^PXRMINDX(9000010.18,"PPI",+$G(DFN),TYPE,ITEM,DATE,DA)) Q:DA<1 S ^TMP($J,"DVPCPT",DFN,DA)=ITEM_U_DATE Q ; PDL(SDATE,EDATE) ; Get all procedures for all patients between dates SDATE and EDATE ;;PPI ; from ^PXRMINDX(9000010.18,"PPI",DFN N DFN S DFN=0 F S DFN=$O(^PXRMINDX(9000010.18,"PPI",DFN)) Q:'DFN D PPL(DFN,SDATE,EDATE) Q ; ROLRNG(PROCDT,ROLES) ; File performer role in ROLES() at the PROCDT date/time the procedure was performed N FOUND,RCNT,DFLT S (RCNT,FOUND)=0 F S RCNT=$O(ROLES("DILIST",RCNT)) Q:'RCNT!$G(FOUND) D . S DFLT=ROLES("DILIST",RCNT,0) . I PROCDT>$P(ROLES("DILIST",RCNT,0),U,4)&((PROCDT<$P(ROLES("DILIST",RCNT,0),U,5))!('$P(ROLES("DILIST",RCNT,0),U,5))) S FOUND=DFLT S:'FOUND FOUND=$G(DFLT) Q FOUND ; SETPID(RECSET,ITMP,ICN) ; N PAT D FHIRPAT^DVPXUTL(.PAT,ICN) M @RECSET@("results",ITMP,"subject")=PAT Q
